title: Campaign Monitor vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Campaign Monitor vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Loops: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Campaign Monitor and Loops comes down to your specific use case. Campaign Monitor is built for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_a: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands
comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Loops?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor wins for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Loops?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
